nasb.text: They do not know, nor do they understand, for He has smeared over their eyes so that they cannot see and their hearts so that they cannot comprehend.

esv.text: They know not, nor do they discern, for he has shut their eyes, so that they cannot see, and their hearts, so that they cannot understand.

cnv.text: 他們並不知道，也不明白； 因為耶和華閉住他們的眼睛，使他們不能看見， 塞住他們的心，使他們不能明白。

ccb.text: 他们愚昧无知，因为眼睛被封住以致看不见，心窍被塞住以致不明白。

csbs.text: 这样的人不明白，也不领悟， 因为耶和华蒙蔽他们的眼使他们看不见， 蒙蔽他们的心使他们不明悟。
